headline: GameStop (GME) Keeps Chasing EBay As Ryan Cohen Drops Award And Targets Rise
summary: GameStop is pursuing a potential acquisition of eBay after an initial rejection, signaling continued interest in expanding beyond its core video game retail business. CEO Ryan Cohen has withdrawn a controversial performance award to emphasize alignment with shareholders and reduce distractions during ongoing talks. The company has raised its financial targets as it renews its push around this potential deal, highlighting the importance of this effort for NYSE:GME. GameStop, trading on...
